info.name: TradeProof API
info.description: Contractor license and insurance data across all 50 US states. 5M+ records from official state licensing boards.

item.name: License Lookup
item.description: Endpoints for looking up, searching, and batch-verifying contractor licenses.

variable.description: Two-letter US state code (e.g. CA, FL, TX).
The contractor license number issued by the state licensing board.

request.description: Retrieve full details for a single contractor license by state and license number. Returns license status, holder name, classification, issue/expiration dates, and disciplinary history when available.

query.description: Business or contractor name to search for. Partial matches supported.
Two-letter US state code to filter results.
Page number for paginated results (starts at 1).

request.description: Search for contractor licenses by business name and state. Returns a paginated list of matching licenses with summary information. Use the page and per_page parameters to navigate large result sets.

Verify multiple contractor licenses in a single request. Submit an array of state/license_number pairs and receive the verification status of each. Useful for onboarding workflows where you need to validate several contractors at once. Invalid or unrecognized licenses are returned with a failed status.

item.name: Insurance
item.description: Endpoints for verifying contractor insurance coverage.

variable.description: Two-letter US state code where the employer operates.
Employer or business name to verify workers compensation coverage for.

request.description: Verify whether a contractor or employer has active workers compensation insurance in a given state. Returns policy status, carrier information, and coverage dates when available. Essential for compliance checks before allowing contractors on job sites.

item.name: Coverage (Public)
item.description: Public endpoints that do not require authentication. Useful for checking API availability and data coverage before integrating.

request.description: Returns a breakdown of data coverage by state, including the number of license records indexed and the date each state was last updated. No authentication required.
Returns aggregate statistics for the TradeProof database, including total license records, number of states covered, and last-updated timestamps. No authentication required.
